policy: source and reconstructed OpenFOAM directories are read-only evidence for this gate
no sbatch, srun, cancel, requeue, or monitor action was performed
no reconstructPar, foamPostProcess, sampler, or solver was run on the login node
wallHeatFlux is diagnostic/support evidence only and never fit as a predictive parameter
no exchange-cell closure, pressure model, energy residual, Nu, K, or scorecard admission changed
